nl_query: Which scripts have been through more than one evaluation cycle and have at least one result history correction, showing the script URN, number of cycles, number of corrections, and the latest final marks.
failed_sql:
SELECT a.script_id, a.urn, COUNT(DISTINCT b.id) AS cycles, COUNT(DISTINCT rh.id) AS corrections, MAX(r.final_marks) AS latest_final_marks
FROM   answer_script a
JOIN   board b ON a.course_id = b.course_id AND a.exam_id = b.exam_id
JOIN   result r ON a.id = r.script_id
JOIN   result_history rh ON r.id = rh.result_id
GROUP  BY a.script_id, a.urn
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT b.id) > 1 AND COUNT(DISTINCT rh.id) > 0
ORDER  BY cycles DESC, latest_final_marks DESC
LIMIT  200;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): answer_script.script_id, answer_script.script_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
